headline: Take-Two (TTWO) Reports FQ3 2026 Net Bookings of $1.76B, Beats Guidance
summary: Take-Two Interactive Software Inc. (NASDAQ:TTWO) is one of the stocks that should double in 3 years. On February 3, Take-Two Interactive Software reported FQ3 2026 results, with Net Bookings reaching $1.76 billion, a 28% increase year-over-year. This performance exceeded the company’s previous guidance and was driven by mainstay titles such as NBA 2K26, Grand Theft […]

headline: The Show Never Stops in WWE® 2K26 King of Kings Edition, Attitude Era Edition, and Monday Night War Edition Available Now Worldwide
summary: NEW YORK, March 06, 2026--Today, 2K announced King of Kings Edition, Attitude Era Edition, and Monday Night War Edition of WWE® 2K26, the newest installment of the flagship WWE video game franchise developed by Visual Concepts, are available now for PlayStation®5 (PS5®), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch™ 2, and PC via Steam. The Standard Edition, featuring cover star and current WWE World Heavyweight Champion, CM Punk, will be available on Friday, March 13, 2026.

headline: Take-Two Insider Sale Raises Questions On Valuation And Analyst Targets
summary: Chief Legal Officer Daniel P. Emerson recently sold shares of Take-Two Interactive Software (NasdaqGS:TTWO). The sale followed the company reporting fiscal results that were materially better than earlier expectations. The transaction adds a fresh data point to insider activity at a time of heightened interest in Take-Two's performance and outlook. Take-Two, known for franchises such as Grand Theft Auto and NBA 2K, sits at the center of the global video game and interactive entertainment...
